candidates.why: Standard top-line revenue label; clearly represents total revenue/sales.
Financial income, not operating revenue; less appropriate than Total Revenue.
Interest income, not operating revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue line.
Ancillary income, not total revenue.
Represents net operating costs, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Income from Operations, net
candidates.why: Balancing item, not revenue.
Finance-related balancing item, not revenue.
Tax expense, not revenue.
Tax subtotal, not revenue.
Tax detail, not revenue.
Tax subtotal, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Provision for Income Tax - Balancing value
candidates.why: Tax balancing item, not revenue.
Tax total, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Net Income Including After Tax Adjustment
candidates.why: Balancing item on net income, not revenue.
Bottom-line net income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Net Income - excluding Extraordinary Itemsapplicable to Common
candidates.why: Net income measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Net Income After Extraordinary Items applicable to Common
candidates.why: Balancing net income item, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Other Comprehensive Income - Net of Tax - Total
candidates.why: OCI, not revenue.
Balancing comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Net Income - Diluted - including Extraordinary Items Applicable to Common
candidates.why: Diluted net income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Net Income - Diluted - excluding Extraordinary Items Applicable to Common - Total
candidates.why: Diluted net income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Allocated Net Income including Extraordinary Items Applicable to Common - Issue Specific
candidates.why: Allocated net income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Allocated Diluted Net Income including Extraordinary Items Applicable to Common - Issue Specific
candidates.why: Allocated diluted net income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Net Income - Diluted - excluding Extraordinary Items Applicable to Common - Issue Specific
candidates.why: Allocated diluted net income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Net Income - excluding Extraordinary Items applicable to Common - Issue Specific
candidates.why: Allocated net income, not revenue.

variables.notes: Total Revenue is the clear top-line revenue figure; other candidates are finance income, taxes, or net income, which are not appropriate for REVT.

candidates.why: Represents direct project-related costs; best proxy for cost of goods/services sold.
Likely includes overhead and SG&A-type costs, not purely direct COGS.
Selling expense (SG&A), not COGS.
Net operating cost, includes multiple components; not a pure COGS line.
R&D, not COGS.
Balance sheet item, not period expense.
Liability, not the COGS expense itself.

variables.notes: External project costs are the most direct production/service-related costs and best represent COGS. Other candidates are broader operating or selling/overhead expenses.

candidates.why: Core SG&A overhead cost (personnel).
Likely includes various SG&A overhead items.
Balance sheet item, not an SG&A expense line.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Selected multiple SG&A components: Salaries and personnel cost and Other operating expenses are classic SG&A. Advertising Expense is a selling expense (part of SG&A). Stock-Based Compensation Expense - Pre-tax - Supplemental is also an overhead component typically within SG&A. All selected rows exclude COGS, D&A, impairments, interest, and taxes, and none are totals or balancing items. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Advertising Expense, [Income Statement] Stock-Based Compensation Expense - Pre-tax - Supplemental

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line.

variables.notes: There is a clear, dedicated R&D expense line; no additional R&D-related rows are needed.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Direct interest expense line, adjusted for capitalization; ideal for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest portion of lease liabilities; relevant interest expense if main line is missing.
Represents minority interest in profit, not interest expense.
Equity interest share of profit, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; backup interest expense measure.
Equity account, not an interest expense.
Equity account, not an interest expense.
Debt balance, not period expense.
Debt balance, not period expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest is the primary interest expense line. The two lease interest lines are added as fallback options in case the primary line is missing in some years. Minority interest and interest-bearing liabilities are excluded as they are not expenses.

candidates.why: Income statement item, not an equity balance.
Portion of profit attributable to parent shareholders, not the equity balance itself.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to the owners of the parent
candidates.why: Represents book equity attributable to parent shareholders, excluding non-controlling interests; ideal for BE.
Represents minority equity, which should map to MIB, not BE.
Includes both parent and minority interests; only used if parent-only equity is unavailable.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to the owners of the parent

variables.notes: Using Equity attributable to the owners of the parent ensures BE excludes non-controlling interests, consistent with the BE+MIB framework.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation, not the balance sheet amount; less ideal for MIB stock.
Income statement allocation of comprehensive income; not the stock balance.
Explicit equity line for non-controlling interests; best choice for MIB.
Appears to duplicate equity minority interests; risk of double-counting if both selected.
Income statement allocation; not the equity stock balance.

variables.notes: Mapped MIB to the balance sheet equity line for non-controlling interests. Did not also select the separate Minority Interest line to avoid potential double-counting of the same underlying amount.
